epic.arc: The repeatable test-quality pipeline, dual-keyed to its lineage. Every bespoke QA handle keeps its local design intent AND pins to its standard-practice name, so the skill this arc delivers inherits fifteen years of others' solved failure-modes and free tooling instead of rediscovering them in retros. The tax this removes is not the vocabulary — it is the isolation the vocabulary creates.
epic.context: Supersedes epic.test-metabolism v1, which wrote the arc in repo idiom alone. A handle severed from its lineage costs real money: retro 0037 (thirteen PRs behind one receipt) is the canonical CI lesson 'a bypassable gate will be bypassed', learned the hard way because the bespoke vocabulary walled the repo off from where that lesson was already written. This arc's discipline is to dual-key every QA handle (local name + standard name) — the repo's own rosetta-creole practice, applied for the first time to its own QA engineering rather than to language. Two protected deltas exceed industry baseline and stay untouched: §A non-bypassable enforcement (a fold, not a permission toggle — no override exists) and §B stub-never-silently-real (mock-vs-real is an auditable runtime admission that screams every turn, mock-shame). Three corrections are baked into the pieces: make the mutation-testing call honestly (don't launder the anti-constant grep as oracle-gap coverage), retire the refuse-token vanity count while keeping negative-path practice with per-assertion messages (defusing Assertion Roulette), and build from existing components (linter / LLM-review / mutation-lane / metrics) — the value is composition plus un-overridable enforcement, not invented parts.
epic.value: Any agent can run one definition-of-done for tests — archetype bars + smell bars + an assertion-power requirement, a type-dispatched review rubric, a non-bypassable enforcement gate, and a self-surfacing backlog — and it refuses weak tests the way the merge fold refuses mock-only receipts; its own holes become its own next work. The repo's QA stops being honor-system convention and becomes executable, lineaged to standard practice so a foreign reviewer credits exactly what exceeds baseline.
epic.horizon: A delivered site .claude/skills/test-organ/ (name bdo's to set): a test-QA pipeline of three context-isolated, prompt-pinned seats — classifier (static categorizer), reviewer (real LLM review step), auditor (suite metrics report) — joined by two refusing seams (a reviewer that refuses to judge an unclassifiable module; an all-green tree that can still be screamed unhealthy), wired into gaps.py so its findings become the next session's backlog. Admitted real only when the auditor reproduces the existing hand-audit (47/49 pins, 0 xfail, the reconcile false positive); until then it judges nothing on the trunk. The create/author seat is deliberately cut — generating acceptance bars is authoring, not review; it lives upstream at the freeze (done-line 0033).

pieces.glue: piece 1 — the classifier fold (standard: static test-categorizer). A pure fold types every tests/ module to exactly one archetype with a NAMED unclassifiable residual, never a silent bucket; a large residual is a finding about the typology, not the tests. Mirrors reflect.py kind-dispatch (0030), no flat rubric. The reviewer must be able to overrule it — static categorizers misclassify on surface features.

piece 2 — assertion power (standard: mutation testing; forces Correction 1). EITHER stand up an opt-in mutation lane (mutmut / cosmic-ray, off the 24s path, scoped to pure-fold modules first) and report a real score, OR keep the anti-constant grep as a labelled smoke-check and stop calling it oracle-gap coverage. No straddle. The seat emits needs_instrumentation (not admit) for any archetype it cannot actually evaluate — a check that passes what it cannot measure is a mock wearing a real receipt.

piece 3 — test smells (standard: test-smell catalog; forces Correction 2). Detect Assertion Roulette first (multi-assert, no message), plus Empty / Redundant Assertion (the existing tautological check, renamed to the field's term), and require per-assertion messages on negative-path tests. The detector is itself falsifiable — an unverified symptom is not a finding. Retire the refuse-token count as a reported metric; report asserted, message-bearing negative-path coverage instead.

piece 4 — the auditor fold (standard: suite metrics report; promotes the seams file to an organ). A pure fold over the whole tree emitting aggregate-only symptoms — done-line pin coverage (the honor-system convention made executable, the arc's centerpiece), asserted-negative-path coverage, single-atom monoculture, the executable-vs-honor-system split. Must scream over an all-green tree. Carries the whole-site acceptance: it must reproduce the existing hand-audit (47/49 pins, 0 xfail, the reconcile false positive) before the site is admitted real.

piece 5 — wire to gaps (standard: auto-generated backlog from CI signal). needs_instrumentation verdicts (piece 2) and aggregate symptoms (piece 4) become pressure-ordered gap-kinds in gaps.py — unpinned-done-line, unmeasured-mutation-lane, assertion-roulette, single-atom-monoculture — in 0048's pattern. The absence of a real mutation score (if 2b was chosen) is itself a standing gap the loop surfaces, deferring the slow-lane sizing to a future session honestly rather than burying it in prose.

piece 6 — orthogonality (standard: deliberately-uncorrelated quality metrics). Record, as an explicit claim, which blind spot each QA layer covers and which it shares (deterministic tests, gate receipts, organs, test-organ). Refuse the claim 'the composition covers it' until the layers' blind spots are shown independent or a cross-layer correctness sensor is named. May be a claim-to-record (a report), not a buildable fold — if its fold cannot be stated, demote it to a report and say so. The seam to a future parent assurance-site.

epic.build_order: 1 -> (2 || 3 || 4) -> 5 -> 6. Each piece lands as a stamped increment with its own done-line, its own negative-path test, and a real send_back on the trunk before it counts (a seat that has only ever said admit is a mock). The site is admitted real only when piece 4's acceptance holds. Every piece's done-line states its standard-practice name in one line so the lineage survives into the built artifact.
epic.provenance: Structured by Claude from bdo's authored v2 draft, which is homed verbatim alongside as epic.test-metabolism.md. The arc, value, horizon, and the six pieces are lifted faithfully from that draft, not invented. The build decomposition is bdo's own (the draft enumerates pieces 1-6 and their build order); confirmed by bdo's confirm-arc gesture, 2026-06-16.
